title: Bedrock Slot Highlight
description: Changes the item slot highlighter to look like Bedrock's.
body:
Tired of Java's slot highlight covering the item you're selecting? Try my recreation of the Bedrock slot highlight!

![Pack Off vs Pack On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc407df8499309f255d19434c3b015f142b56048.png)
